Other real gaps: seeded-deliverable download 410 (T2 storage parity), MFA/email stubs (T4/T5), DB-only /ready (T3). Cloud/terraform OUT of scope (Dave's decision).

tasks.title: Live-AI enablement: declare anthropic dep, fix stale model default, boot preflight (D-026)
verify: anthropic added to apps/api deps; `docker compose build api` then in-container `python -c 'import anthropic'` succeeds
default model no longer claude-opus-4-7 (config.py + docker-compose.yml) - use claude-sonnet-5 (smoke-validated)
assert_safe_for_runtime fails loudly in live mode when provider key missing OR SDK not importable OR model is a placeholder; fixture unaffected
unit: live+missing-key raises at boot; live+valid boots; fixture unaffected
DECISIONS gains D-026
tasks.notes: See SPRINT_6.md T0. 2026-07-12 live smoke PROVED the path works (claude-sonnet-5, 2.6s, redaction stripped {client_org:2,name:2,email:2}, llm_calls row correct, no PII). ONLY blockers: (1) anthropic SDK not declared (apps/api/pyproject.toml:6-30) - adapter lazy-imports at app/ai/llm.py:121 -> ImportError on first call; (2) stale default model claude-opus-4-7 (config.py:53 + docker-compose.yml:17) invalid -> 404; (3) no boot preflight (assert_safe_for_runtime config.py:101, called main.py:41). Mirror _build_provider branch logic (llm.py:265). Optionally extend GET /admin/ai-status (routes/admin.py:490, checks key only :513). REBUILD api image after adding the dep.

TDD: enroll->verify->login-with-TOTP; wrong/expired rejected; recovery-code login; flag-off = no challenge
verify endpoints rate-limited
